rulings.Case Title: JOSE CERON ET AL VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses And Compliance Of Document Production Propounded To Jose Ceron, Judy Judkins, Brian Medina(Aka) Brian Rangel), Monica Medina; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 24, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT SALLY LIU Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses And Compliance Of Document Production Propounded To Jose Ceron, Judy Judkins, Brian Medina(Aka) Brian Rangel), Monica Medina; Request For Sanctions is DENIED, moot. Requests for fees are denied. Parties, especially the moving party, are ordered to comply in good faith with the Discovery Act requirement to meet and confer in the future. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE CERON ET AL VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Seeking Leave To File 4th Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 24, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT SALLY LIU, JOHN LIU Motion Seeking Leave To File 4th Amended Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. Cross Complainant must file and serve the Fourth Amended Cross-Complaint by 4:00pm on February 24, 2020. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ETHEL FLORES VS. MARTIN LUTHER KING/ MARCUS GARVEY SQUARE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Special Motion To Strike Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 24, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY Amended Notice Of Special Motion To Strike Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Settlement on file. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN F. CABERTO VS. KRISTOPHER CABERTO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 24, 2020 line 4. PLAINTIFF JOHN CABERTO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is GRANTED. Plaintiff shifted its burden. Defendant failed to create material triable issues of fact. Defendant's arguments regarding ownership and creation of a lease agreement are not supported by any legal authority re: trust law; power of attorney law, etc. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRAVIS MARSH ET AL VS. RUTH BONILLA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 24, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT RUTH BONILLA, LUIS HIDALGO, CRISTINA BONILLA, LUIS HIDALGO, EDGARDO PALACIOS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to February 28, 2020 to be heard in department 302 at 9:30 a.m. per the Order of the Presiding Judge. Briefing schedule remains in accordance with the original hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID TSAO VS. GENERAL TSO KITCHEN, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff David Tsao To Set Aside Order Granting Defendant General Tso Kitchen Inc'S Motion For Summary Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 473(B)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 24, 2020 line 7. PLAINTIFF DAVID TSAO Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff David Tsao To Set Aside Order Granting Defendant General Tso Kitchen Inc'S Motion For Summary Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 473(B) is GRANTED. Plaintiff to file opposition by 2:00 p.m. on February 24, 2020. Defendant to file reply no later than February 27, 2020. Hearing on the Motion for Summary Judgment is set for March 2, 2020. Plaintiff to submit courtesy copies of the moving papers and the opposition by no later than 2:00 p.m,. on February 24 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)
